mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( user_id, login_id, password, name, phone, birth, email, status, gender, e_name, postal_code, address, address_detail, created_at ) VALUES ( user_id_seq.NEXTVAL, #{login_id}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{birth}, #{email}, '정상', #{gender}, #{e_name}, #{postal_code}, #{address}, #{address_detail}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO accounts_personal ( account_id, account_pw, bank_name, account_no, user_id, balance, currency, account_status, limit_one_time, limit_daily ) VALUES ( account_id_seq.NEXTVAL, #{account_pw}, #{bank_name}, #{account_no}, user_id_seq.CURRVAL, #{balance}, #{currency}, #{account_status}, #{limit_one_time}, #{limit_daily} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM accounts_personal WHERE account_no = #{account_no}
